summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Simplifii dark UI overhaul. All features working correctly: dark theme (bg #09090B), login/auth, dashboard with 6 tool cards, Brief Simplifier with 10-file upload, Results page with 'Start New Brief' and 'Get AI Guidance' buttons, Credits page with 3 tiers, About page, and Accessibility toolbar with 4 buttons.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with dark theme (bg #09090B = rgb(9, 9, 11))
Landing page shows 6 tool cards (Brief Simplifier, Rubric Simplifier, Essay Scorer, Humaniser, Assessment Scaffolder, Course Planner)
Login page: email/password login works with test@simplifii.com / test123
Dashboard loads with 6 tool cards and user name displayed
Navigation bar shows all 6 tool links, credit badge, and user name
Brief Simplifier page: form with title, type dropdown (7 options), file upload zone (up to 10 PDFs)
Results page: 'Start New Brief' button exists (data-testid='start-new-brief-btn')
Results page: 'Back to Briefs' button exists (data-testid='back-to-briefs-btn')
Results page: 'Get AI Guidance' buttons exist and call /api/briefs/ai-guidance endpoint successfully
Results page: 'Break it down' buttons exist for task breakdown
Results page: Export PDF and Word buttons work
Accessibility toolbar appears with 4 buttons (Text, Dyslexia, Contrast, Motion)
Credits page loads with dark theme and 3 pricing tiers (5, 10, 20 credits)
About page loads with dark theme
Backend /api/briefs/ai-guidance endpoint returns guidance text
Backend /api/auth/login works correctly
Backend /api/auth/me returns user data with session
Backend /api/credits/balance returns credit count
Backend /api/briefs/history returns user's briefs
Backend /api/briefs/{id} returns specific brief with output_json
Backend /api/credits/purchase creates Stripe checkout session
Backend /api/briefs/break-down returns micro-steps
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Dark theme consistently applied across all pages (bg-[#09090B])
Multi-file upload correctly shows 'UP TO 10 FILES' limit
seed_data_creation: Existing brief 'Marketing Strategy Essay' used for testing Results page

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check bypassed for owner testing - payments still create real Stripe checkout sessions

context_for_next_testing_agent: All dark UI overhaul features verified working. Test user has 0 credits but credit check is bypassed for testing. Existing brief 'Marketing Strategy Essay' available for Results page testing. AI Guidance endpoint (/api/briefs/ai-guidance) working and returns helpful guidance text.
